scripts.build:packages: bun run --filter '@dryui/lint' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/primitives' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/ui' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/feedback-server' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/cli' build
scripts.build:docs: bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-spec && bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-architecture && bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-contract && bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-llms && bun run --filter '@dryui/theme-wizard' build && bun run --filter '@dryui/docs' build
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:docs && bun run build:wizard
scripts.test: bun run test:unit && bun run test:browser
scripts.check:packages: bun run --filter '@dryui/primitives' check && bun run --filter '@dryui/ui' check
scripts.check:contract: bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-spec && bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-contract && git diff --exit-code -- packages/mcp/src/spec.json packages/mcp/src/contract.v1.json packages/mcp/src/contract.v1.schema.json
scripts.check:docs:llms: bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-llms && git diff --exit-code -- apps/docs/static/llms.txt apps/docs/static/llms-components.txt
scripts.check:wizard: bun run --filter '@dryui/wizard-app' check && bun run --filter '@dryui/wizard' check
scripts.check:cli: bun run --filter '@dryui/mcp' generate-spec && bunx tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.check: bun run check:exports && bun run check:packages && bun run check:docs && bun run check:contract && bun run check:docs:llms && bun run check:wizard && bun run check:mcp && bun run check:feedback-server && bun run check:cli && bun run check:lint:violations
scripts.release: bun run validate && bun run scripts/release.ts
